name: UserPropertyItem
summary: The UserPropertyItem class contains information about the user properties in the Tekla Structures catalog.

constructors.name: UserPropertyItem
constructors.summary: Creates a new user property item instance.

methods.name: AddToObjectType
methods.summary: Adds the user property item to the given object type.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes the user property item from the database.

methods.name: GetDefaultValue(Double.)
methods.summary: Gets the default value of a double property.

methods.name: GetDefaultValue(Int32.)
methods.summary: Gets the default value of an integer property.

methods.name: GetDefaultValue(String.)
methods.summary: Gets the default value of a string property.

methods.name: GetLabel.
methods.summary: Gets the label of the user property. Labels are translated when translation is available.

methods.name: GetLabel(Boolean)
methods.summary: Gets the label of the user property.

methods.name: GetObjectTypes
methods.summary: Gets the object types which contain this user property item.

methods.name: GetOptions(List.KeyValuePair.Double, String...)
methods.summary: Gets the value options of a double property. Option strings are translated when translation is available.

methods.name: GetOptions(List.KeyValuePair.Int32, String...)
methods.summary: Gets the value options of an integer property. Option strings are translated when translation is available.

methods.name: GetOptions(List.KeyValuePair.String, String...)
methods.summary: Gets the value options of a string property. Option strings are translated when translation is available.

methods.name: GetOptions(List.KeyValuePair.Double, String..., Boolean)
methods.summary: Gets the value options of a double property.

methods.name: GetOptions(List.KeyValuePair.Int32, String..., Boolean)
methods.summary: Gets the value options of an integer property.

methods.name: GetOptions(List.KeyValuePair.String, String..., Boolean)
methods.summary: Gets the value options of a string property.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts the user property item to the database.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies the user property item.

methods.name: RemoveFromObjectType
methods.summary: Removes the user property item from the given object type.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects by name the user property item from the database.

methods.name: SetDefaultValue(Double)
methods.summary: Sets the default value of a double property.

methods.name: SetDefaultValue(Int32)
methods.summary: Sets the default value of an integer property.

methods.name: SetDefaultValue(String)
methods.summary: Sets the default value of a string property.

methods.name: SetLabel
methods.summary: Sets the label of the user property.

methods.name: SetOptions(List.KeyValuePair.Double, String..)
methods.summary: Sets the value options of a double property. The maximum count of options is 400.

methods.name: SetOptions(List.KeyValuePair.Int32, String..)
methods.summary: Sets the value options of an integer property. The maximum count of options is 400.

methods.name: SetOptions(List.KeyValuePair.String, String..)
methods.summary: Sets the value options of a string property. The maximum count of options is 400.

properties.name: AffectsNumbering
properties.summary: Indicates whether the property value affects the numbering of objects.

properties.name: FieldType
properties.summary: The field type of the user property.

properties.name: Level
properties.summary: The level at which the user property has been defined.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The name of the user property.

properties.name: Type
properties.summary: The type of the user property.

properties.name: Unique
properties.summary: Indicates whether the property value is copied when the object is copied.

properties.name: Visibility
properties.summary: Indicates whether the property value is visible/editable.
